panels.description: Number of Prometheus scrape targets currently down
panels.title: Targets Down

panels.description: Vector log shipper health. If down, visitor panels show zeros.
panels.title: Vector Running

targets.expr: _time:24h kubernetes.container_name:controller | stats by (_time:1h) count_uniq(client_ip) as unique_ips

panels.description: Pod memory working set as percentage of container limit (4Gi). Using pod-level aggregation.
panels.title: Dashboard Memory Usage (% of Limit)

panels.description: Highest dead tuple count across all tables. High values indicate autovacuum can't keep up.
panels.title: Max Dead Tuples

panels.description: Top 5 tables by dead tuple count over time
panels.title: Dead Tuples Over Time

panels.description: Active locks by mode. Watch for AccessExclusiveLock during pipeline runs.
panels.title: PostgreSQL Locks

panels.description: CPU throttling ratio for PostgreSQL pod
panels.title: PostgreSQL CPU Throttling

panels.description: Pod memory working set as percentage of container limit (512Mi). Using pod-level aggregation.
panels.title: PostgreSQL Memory Usage (% of Limit)

panels.description: Time since last scheduled pipeline run. Alert if >8 days (691200s). Uses schedule time since completed jobs are garbage-collected.
panels.title: Time Since Last Run

panels.description: Countdown to next scheduled pipeline run
panels.title: Next Scheduled Run

targets.expr:
(
  (1 - sum without (mode) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node-exporter", mode=~"idle|iowait|steal", instance="$instance", cluster="$cluster"}[$__rate_interval])))
/ ignoring(cpu) group_left
  count without (cpu, mode) (node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node-exporter", mode="idle", instance="$instance", cluster="$cluster"})
)
max by (mountpoint) (node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node-exporter", instance="$instance", cluster="$cluster", fstype!="", mountpoint!=""})
max by (mountpoint) (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="node-exporter", instance="$instance", cluster="$cluster", fstype!="", mountpoint!=""})

panels.description: Ingress NGINX controller process CPU usage
panels.title: Ingress Controller CPU

panels.description: Ingress NGINX controller process resident memory
panels.title: Ingress Controller Memory

panels.description: Rate of Prometheus rule evaluation failures
panels.title: Rule Eval Failures

panels.description: Rate of failed Alertmanager notifications. Non-zero means alerts are firing but not reaching you.
panels.title: Alert Notification Failures

panels.description: Number of Prometheus scrape targets up vs down over time
panels.title: Scrape Target Status
